title: The Plain-Title of the Article
deck: One or two sentences that sit under the headline and summarize the piece.
author: CLYR Editorial
metaDescription: A 150-160 character SEO/social description. Specific, no fluff, mentions the topic and the angle.
ogTitle: Optional shorter title for social cards (defaults to title)
bodyHtml:
Opening paragraph. Use plain HTML: <p> for paragraphs, <h2> for section headers, <h3> for sub-sections, <ul>/<ol>/<li> for lists, <strong>/<em> for emphasis, and <a href> for links.

A section heading

Body text. Journals are editorial and educational: you may cite and discuss clinical trials with sources, but keep it informative rather than a product pitch. Do not make efficacy or 'cure' claims about CLYR products themselves.

Link internally where useful, e.g. our tirzepatide page or another journal article.

sources.label: Author AB, Author CD. Title of the study. Journal Name. 2026.
Second source, formatted the same way.
